title: Create: Legacy Copper Continued
description: Replaces vanilla copper with textures that match the Create mod's Legacy Copper style.
body:
![Copper Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a608e1fe937b2d6070ea54158b672883c9c79eac.png)



**Create: Legacy Copper Continued** is a simple texture pack that changes all vanilla copper blocks and items to match the aesthetic of the Create mod’s Legacy Copper. Perfect for anyone who wants visual consistency when combining vanilla builds with Create machinery.

[CurseForge Page](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/create-legacy-copper-continued)

Feel free to use it in a modpack!

Mod supports so far:
- [Friends & Foes](https://modrinth.com/mod/friends-and-foes)
